name: field
notes:
Includes both constant properties such as Title and dynamically calculated ones such as the number of participants with data. Properties included are:
  1. field_id
  2. title
  3. available (0 full, 1 view-only, 4 retired)
  4. stability (0 complete, 1 updateable, 2 accruing, 3 variable)
  5. private (0 public, 1 restricted)
  6. value_type (11 int, 21 single choice, 22 multi choice, 31 real, 41 string, 51 date, 61 time, 101 compound, 201 blob)
  7. base_type (0 see value type, 11 int, 31 real, 41 string, 51 date)
  8. item_type (0 data, 10 sample, 20 bulk, 30 record)
  9. strata (0 primary, 2 auxillary, 3 derived)
  10. instanced (0 no, 1 defined, 2 variable)
  11. arrayed (0 no, 1 yes)
  12. sexed (0 unisex, 1 male, 2 female)
  13. units
  14. main_category
  15. encoding_id
  16. instance_id
  17. instance_min
  18. instance_max
  19. array_min
  20. array_max
  21. notes
  22. debut
  23. version
  24. num_participants
  25. item_count
  26. showcase_order
  27. tier

name: encoding
notes:
Dictionary of encodings used for categorical variables. The actual values associated with each encoding are held in the "Values of ... encodings" schema. Properties included are:
  1. encoding_id
  2. title
  3. availability (0 yes)
  4. coded_as (11 int, 31 real, 41 string, 51 date
  5. structure (1 list, 2 tree)
  6. num_members
  7. descript

name: category
descript: Categories used to group data fields and other objects on Showcase interface
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. category_id
  2. title
  3. availability
  4. group_type
  5. descript
  6. notes

name: returns
notes:
Lists the datasets returned to UK Biobank by researchers which have been approved for release to other researchers. Properties included are:
  1. archive_id
  2. application_id
  3. title
  4. availability
  5. personal
  6. notes

name: esimpint
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. encoding_id
  2. value
  3. meaning
  4. showcase_order

name: esimpstring
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. encoding_id
  2. value
  3. meaning
  4. showcase_order

name: esimpreal
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. encoding_id
  2. value
  3. meaning
  4. showcase_order

name: esimpdate
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. encoding_id
  2. value
  3. meaning
  4. showcase_order

name: instances
notes:
Dictionaires of codings used to described data fields which contain multiple instances of a value. Properties included are:
  1. instance_id
  2. descript
  3. num_members

name: insvalue
notes:
Values of specifically-indexed instances, to be used in conjunction with Schema 9. Properties included are:
  1. instance_id
  2. index
  3. title
  4. descript

name: ehierint
notes:
Hierarchical encodings are sets of values linked in a "tree structure" in which the value above another one in the tree is known as the parent of the latter. Properties included are:
  1. encoding_id
  2. code_id
  3. parent_id
  4. value
  5. meaning
  6. selectable
  7. showcase_order

name: ehierstring
notes:
Hierarchical encodings are sets of values linked in a "tree structure" in which the value above another one in the tree is known as the parent of the latter. Properties included are:
  1. encoding_id
  2. code_id
  3. parent_id
  4. value
  5. meaning
  6. selectable
  7. showcase_order

name: catbrowse
notes:
The browse tree is structured as a set of parent-child relationship whereby the parent category is one above the (possibly multiple) child categories. The IDs listed are defined in Schema 3. Properties included are:
  1. parent_id
  2. child_id
  3. showcase_order

name: recommended
notes:
UK Biobank maintains lists of 'recommended' data fields which researchers are encouraged to use as starting points for baskets in various areas of interest. Properties included are:
  1. Category ID
  2. Field ID
These categories are identified in schema 3 as having group_type=0.

name: snps
notes:
The results of the UKB genotyping exercise to determine 800,000 SNPs using a custom chip.
Properties included are:

  1. affy_id
  2. rs_id
  3. chr_id
  4. pos_int
  5. pos_end_int
  6. nitems
  7. num_aa0
  8. num_ab1
  9. num_bb2
  10. num_x3
  11. loctype_int
  12. strand
  13. strand_vs_snp
  14. ref
  15. allele_a
  16. allele_b

name: fieldsum
notes:
Primay characteristics of data fields. Properties included are:
  1. field_id
  2. title
  3. item_type

name: record_table
descript: Record tables available via data portal
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. rectab_id - unique identifier for table
  2. table_name - used for selection in portal
  3. record_field_id - Showcase field which gives access to these records
  4. parent_id - the rectab_id for any table which is the parent to this one in a perent-child relationship
  5. title - human readable description
  6. available - data available iff value is 0
  7. private - data restricted unless 0
  8. nrows - approximate number of rows (will change with withdrawals)
  9. notes - text description of table contents/purpose

name: record_column
descript: Columns of data in Record tables
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. rectab_id - links to record_table
  2. column_name
  3. ~Hvalue_type~value_type~
  4. encoding_id - references Showcase ~Hdata_coding~encodings~
  5. orda
  6. units
  7. notes

name: publication
notes:
Publications related to the study, the use of its data and results generated therefrom. Properties included are:

  1. publication id (UKB internal)
  2. title
  3. keywords
  4. author(s)
  5. journal
  6. year of publication
  7. publication date
  8. abstract
  9. PubMed ID
  10. DOI
  11. URL
  12. Total citations
  13. Recent citations (last 2 years)
  14. When citation counts last updated

name: esimptime
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. encoding_id
  2. value
  3. meaning
  4. showcase_order

name: related
notes:
This schema shows how individual data fields are related. Properties included are:
  1. ID for field A (lowest ID)
  2. ID for field B
  3. Text description of the relationship between the fields A and B

name: intresource
notes: Describe the resources held internally by UKB

name: extresource
notes: External resources

name: appxpub
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. app_id - ~Happlication~application~ ID
  2. pub_id - ~Hpublication~publication~ ID

name: fieldxref
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. field_id - ~Hdata_field~field~ ID
  2. ref_id - ~Hresources~resource~ ID

name: catxref
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. label_id - ~Hcategory~category~ ID
  2. ref_id - ~Hresources~resource~ ID

name: application
notes:
Applications (researcher projects) which have been approved for access to UK Biobank data.

Properties included are:

  1. app_id - ~Happlication~application~ ID
  2. title - title of research project
  3. pi - principal investigator
  4. institution - institution primarily responsible
  5. notes - description of project

name: schema
descript: Schema provided for the Showcase service
notes:
Properties included are:
  1. schema_id
  2. name
  3. descript
  4. notes
